baseline_no_context<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>Short note: While the response is consistent with persona and maintains quality, it lacks naturalness in tone due to strict adherence to protocol without room for dialogue.

The response is highly relevant to the context, consistent with the persona of a strict and fair Gatekeeper who upholds traditions. The natural language used maintains formality but could be slightly more conversational for better flow. Overall quality remains high despite minor room for improvement in tone softening without compromising authority.
